Res.tr: Path to a MATPOWER .m case file (case9/case30/case118/case300)

Res.id: Override Header/solver options below (otherwise use the XML config values):
Res.tr: Override Header/solver options below (otherwise use the XML config values):

Res.id: Seed initial angles from a sparse DC power-flow solve (natID sparse solver)
Res.tr: Seed initial angles from a sparse DC power-flow solve (natID sparse solver)

These options apply on top of whatever the selected SVC config XML file specifies. The SVC bus/type assignment (which bus is SVC Type I, SVC Type II or standard) always comes from the XML config file itself, on the Converter tab.
